message:
fix: add missing evaluate_size_class method, fix TLS tests, remove dead stdio code

- Add SosBarrierController::evaluate_size_class() method that was being
  called but not defined, causing build failures
- Add observe_size_class_mapping() to RuntimeMathKernel as caller
- Update state() to check size_class_hash_valid and last_size_class_value
- Fix TLS test compilation errors from TlsEntry type migration:
  - Add TestTlsBlock::set() helper for encoding key sequence
  - Fix Cell<TlsEntry>.set() vs .store() method call
  - Update all tests to use TlsEntry instead of raw integers
- Remove dead host_fopen_fn, host_fdopen_fn, prefer_host_stdio_streams
  and related type aliases after native-only fopen/fdopen rewrite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
